Pandowdy Apple IIe Emulator
Table of Contents

Namespace Pandowdy.EmuCore.Services

Classes

CharacterRomProvider

Loads Apple IIe enhanced character ROM from embedded resources and provides glyph access.

EmulatorStateProvider

Reactive provider for emulator execution state, using a BehaviorSubject to publish state changes.

FrameGenerator

Generates Apple II video frames by coordinating bitmap rendering, memory access, and system status. Produces annotated frames for downstream consumers (e.g., NTSC post-processing, GUI display).

FrameProvider

Provides double-buffered frame management for Apple II display with dimension validation.

LegacyBitmapRenderer

Basic monochrome bitmap renderer for Apple IIe video modes (stopgap implementation).

NullFloatingBusProvider

Simple floating bus provider that always returns zero.

RandomFloatingBusProvider

Floating bus provider that returns random values for each read.

StateSnapshot

Immutable snapshot of the emulator's execution state at a specific point in time.

SystemRomProvider

Provides Apple IIe system ROM storage and access.

SystemStatusProvider

Provides observable system status tracking with soft switch response integration.

SystemStatusSnapshot

Immutable snapshot of all Apple IIe system status flags and soft switch states.

SystemStatusSnapshotBuilder

Mutable builder for creating SystemStatusSnapshot instances.

Made with docfx
